name: Packages
description: When you have many ESPHome devices (or are producing and distributing them at scale), a common need tends to surface: configuration modularization. You'll likely want to break your configuration into common (groups of) elements, building it into reusable pieces which can subsequently be used by many/all devices. Only unique pieces of your configuration remain in any given device's YAML configuration file.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: Password to be used for authentication, if required.

config_entries.description: Username to be used for authentication, if required.

config_entries.label: Files
config_entries.description: List of files to include. Can be one of:

config_entries.label: Path
config_entries.description: Base common path of included files.

config_entries.label: Ref
config_entries.description: The Git ref(erence) to be used when pulling content from the repository.

config_entries.label: Refresh
config_entries.description: The interval at which the content from the repository should be refreshed.
